titleStmt.title: SII 9.466: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao

No. 466. This No. should be read(A.R. No. 371 of 1921.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE ALANKARAMANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE TIRUVIRATTANESVARA TEMPLE AT TIRUVADI, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1391 (mistake for 1393), Khara, Vaiśākha, śu. 10, corresponding probably to A.D. 1472 April 29, Monday (not verifiable). It records the gift of the taxes collected from the village Mosukoḷattūr, hamlet of Tribhuvana-Mahādēvipaṭṭana in Vaḷidilambaṭṭu-chāvaḍi, by Timmi-Nāyaka, the agent of Aṇṇamarasayya, who was the deputy of Sāḷuva Narasiṅgayyadēva-Mahā-arasu, for the expenses connected with the Vasanta-festival of the god Vīraṭadēva at Tiruvadi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīvijayādbhudayaśakavaruṣa 1391 neya mēle naḍeva kharasaṁvatsarada vayiśākha śu 10 lū śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara mēdinīmēsaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva sāḷuva narasiṁgayyadēvama
hāarasugaḷu Avasarada Aṁṇamarasayyana kāryyake karttarāda ti(ṁ)mmināyakaru tiruvadiya vīraṭadēvarigū koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada paṭe Aṁṇamarssayyana dharmmavāgi vayiśākhamāsadalū
naḍava vasaṁtatirunāḷa Ubhayakke dhvajārōhaṇa Uṭara vayiśākha śu 5 Ārabhya A śu 15 varege dina 10 kaṁ vasaṁta Ubhayake sērisi koṭṭadu Aṁṇamarssayyana Amaranāyakatanada
vaḷidilaṁbaṭucāviḍiya tribhuvanamahādēvipaṭana mosukoḷattūra grāma 1 kaṁ rēkhe ga 172 . 1 . 3 kaṁ rē visiṣṭavāgi guttige rēkheyāgi naḍadu bahudu 125 Akṣā
radalu grāma Oṁda kaṁ guttage rēkhe nūṟaippattaAyidu hoṁnanū dēvara vasaṁtatirunāḷa Ubhakke sērisi koṭṭevāgi Ī grāmada catussīmege saluva naṁje puṁje vānpayiru pupanṛ
yiru vāsiluvari vāluvari śakukaḍime taṟikaḍame māvaḍe maravaḍe kaḷuvaḍe nāraḍe baḷuku nīru Ūrasante modalāda hala Upādhigaḷu saha nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi
siddha sādhyaveṁba Aṣṭabhōgatējasāmyagaḷanu sarvamānyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi Anubhavisikoṁḍu Ī vasaṁtada Ubhayavanu saṁvatsaraṁpratiŪ tappade naḍasuvudakke koṭṭu kēḷviya
pēriya Ubhayaṁverasi �yo grāmake Aṟe mānyavu maṭhakke Aṟamānyavāgi koṭadu nāḍa Aḷaukōlalu naṁjenelanu
mā 5 Akṣaradalū Ayidu māu Ayidu māu puṁje nelanū Upādhi saha Anubhavisikoṁbō
deṁdu koṭa dharmaśāsanapaṭṭe . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krumi . saubarayatu timmana vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 9.466 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
